request_text: Remediate the architectural ratchet test_no_raw_mission_spec_paths::test_no_raw_mission_spec_path_strings_outside_exempt_owners — it is RED on upstream/main (pre-existing, not from the current mission): raw 'KITTY_SPECS_DIR' path-string offenders (e.g. merge.py:846 kitty_specs_root = (repo_resolved / KITTY_SPECS_DIR).resolve(...)) appear outside the exempt-owner set. Investigate each offender and either route it through the canonical mission-spec-path seam or add a justified exemption, so the ratchet passes.
